site.description: A creative studio for tools, experiments, and visual transmissions.
site.metaDescription: A creative studio for tools, experiments, and visual transmissions. Built with craft.

tools_page.title: Utility Tools
tools_page.lede: Simple, focused utilities that work offline. Each one does one thing well.

feed_page.title: Feed
feed_page.lede: Visual transmissions from the Mentria studio.
feed_page.empty_msg: > no transmissions yet. check back soon.

pwa.banner_desc: Add to home screen — works offline.
pwa.ios_step1: Tap the Share button at the bottom of the screen
pwa.macos_step2: From the menu bar, choose File → Add to Dock…
pwa.chrome_step1: Click the install icon in your browser's address bar.
pwa.chrome_step2: Or open the menu (⋮) and choose Install Mentria.
pwa.note: Once installed, Mentria runs offline and your local data stays on your device.

ai-chat.title: AI Chat
ai-chat.lede: Qwen3.5-0.8B running locally in your browser. No server, no API keys. Supports vision.

base64-codec.title: Base64 Codec
base64-codec.lede: Encode and decode text or files to and from Base64. Supports images, documents, and any file type. Everything runs locally in your browser.

coin-flip.title: Coin Flip
coin-flip.lede: Heads or tails — flip a coin instantly. Run a best-of series for tiebreakers. Works offline.

color-picker.title: Color Picker
color-picker.lede: Pick any color, view its HEX / RGB / HSL values, and generate harmonious palettes. Works offline.

countdown-timer.title: Countdown Timer
countdown-timer.lede: Set a duration or pick a target time. Up to 4 independent timers with alarm sound.

decision-wheel.title: Decision Wheel
decision-wheel.lede: Can't decide? Spin the wheel and let fate choose. Works offline.

flappy.title: Flappy
flappy.lede: A paper plane threading a stack of command prompts. Tap, click, or press SPACE to flap. Don't crash the prompt.

invoice.title: Invoice Generator
invoice.lede: Build clean, single-page invoices in your browser. Auto-saves as you type. Print to A4 or export to JSON.

markdown-pdf.title: Markdown → PDF
markdown-pdf.lede: Write markdown, see a live preview, and download a clean professional PDF. Auto-saves to your browser. No data leaves your device.

minesweeper.title: Minesweeper
minesweeper.lede: Classic logic puzzle in terminal dress. Click to dig, right-click (or F-mode) to flag. Numbers count adjacent mines. Don't pop the pink ones.

pong.title: Pong
pong.lede: Brick-buster meets paddle game. Catch falling powerups, clear the wall, survive levels that get faster and meaner. Runs locally — no data leaves your device.

quick-notes.title: Quick Notes
quick-notes.lede: A minimal scratchpad that lives in your browser. Create multiple notes, auto-saved on every keystroke.

quote.title: Motivational Quote
quote.lede: Original quotes generated by AI, running locally in your browser. No data leaves your device.

radio.title: Infinite Radio
radio.lede: AI-generated epic cinematic music, streaming infinitely. Learns your taste locally — no data leaves your device.

tetris.title: Tetris
tetris.lede: Stack tetrominoes. Clear lines. Speed ramps every 10 lines. Pieces in cyan, purple, pink, amber, green — the Mentria palette.

tetris.modal_intro: Move with ← →, rotate with ↑, soft drop with ↓, hard drop with SPACE. C to hold a piece.

pong.empty_powerups: no powerups · catch the falling tokens
pong.modal_intro: Bounce the ball off your paddle. Break every brick to advance. Catch the falling powerup tokens — but watch out for the red ones.
pong.launch_hint: press SPACE or click to launch ▲
pong.pause_desc: Press P to resume, or restart from scratch.
pong.gameover_desc:
You reached level {level} with a score of {score}.
High score: {high}

flappy.modal_intro:
Steer the paper plane through gaps in the command prompts.
Each prompt cleared = +1. Hit anything = SIGSEGV.
flappy.start_hint: press SPACE or click to flap ▲
flappy.pause_text: SIGINT — PAUSED · press P to resume

minesweeper.hint: right-click to flag · long-press on mobile
minesweeper.desc_won: You swept the field without detonation.
